channel.title: A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Recent content on A Guide to Cloud & AI

item.title: What's New in M365 Copilot — March 2026
item.description: Stay up to date with the latest features and updates in Microsoft 365 Copilot for March 2026. This monthly roundup covers everything new — from agent improvements to UI changes.

item.title: What's New in M365 Copilot — Feb 2026
item.description: Monthly roundup of everything new in Microsoft 365 Copilot for February 2026.

item.title: Free Enterprise Copilot Chat Deep Dive
item.description: In this Free Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat Masterclass, I walk you through 18 powerful features available in Copilot Chat for Enterprise, and show how you can use them securely and effectively in real workplace scenarios.

item.title: Azure DevOps CI/CD — Full Hands-on Lab
item.description: This practical Azure DevOps hands-on lab takes you through the full CI/CD process — build, test, and deploy — using real-world examples.

item.title: Copilot Studio Beginner Lab — Part 1
item.description: Get started with Microsoft Copilot Studio in this step-by-step beginner lab. You’ll learn how to create your first AI agent, explore different types of topics, and deploy your agent to a demo site for live testing—all without writing code.

item.title: Researcher Agent Explained
item.description: Explore the Researcher Agent’s full power in M365. Learn how to summarize, generate, and research efficiently with AI — step-by-step for all levels.

item.title: Prompt Engineering Basics — Part 1
item.description: Explore prompt engineering using a cute and engaging visual approach! In this tutorial, we use a Cavalier King Charles Spaniel to illustrate the building blocks of powerful AI prompts — ideal for beginners and educators alike. 🐶

item.title: Azure App Service Migration Lab
item.description: Get hands-on with Azure App Service migration in this step-by-step tutorial. Whether you’re new to Azure or looking to sharpen your cloud migration skills, this practical lab shows you how to move your applications to Azure with confidence.

item.title: Microsoft 365 Agent Builder — Build 8 AI Agents
item.description: Build 8 unique AI agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent Builder. A beginner-friendly, hands-on tutorial to master agent types, capabilities, and deployment.

item.title: AZ-104 — Azure Administrator
item.description:
About This Certification

Exam AZ-104 measures your ability to manage Azure identities, governance, storage, compute, and virtual networks.

Key Topics

  • Manage Azure identities and governance (15-20%)
  • Implement and manage storage (15-20%)
  • Deploy and manage Azure compute resources (20-25%)
  • Configure and manage virtual networking (20-25%)
  • Monitor and maintain Azure resources (10-15%)

item.title: AZ-500 — Azure Security Technologies
item.description:
About This Certification

AZ-500 measures your ability to manage identity and access, implement platform protection, manage security operations, and secure data and applications.

item.title: AZ-900 — Azure Fundamentals
item.description:
About This Certification

Exam AZ-900 validates your foundational knowledge of cloud concepts, Azure services, Azure workloads, security, privacy, pricing, and support.

item.title: SC-900 — Security, Compliance & Identity
item.description:
About This Certification

SC-900 validates foundational knowledge of security, compliance, and identity concepts across Microsoft services.

item.title: Azure VNet Peering — Hands-on Lab
item.description: Get hands-on experience with Azure VNet Peering. Learn how to connect virtual networks in Azure, configure peering, and understand key networking concepts.

item.title: Azure Firewall — Beginner Hands-on Lab
item.description: This lab walks you through how to set up and configure Azure Firewall. Learn about rules, policies, and how Azure Firewall helps protect your cloud workloads.

item.title: 👋 About
item.description:
About Me — Susanth Sutheesh

Hi, I’m Susanth Sutheesh — a passionate cloud educator, Microsoft Technical Specialist, and content creator based in New Zealand 🇳🇿
